response.justification: Despite extensive senior-level experience, the candidate lacks junior-level alignment: they are overqualified, have minimal Java exposure (listed among 10+ languages with no project context), hold only basic German (required fluency), and their career trajectory suggests they would not accept or thrive in an entry-level role.
strengths: Extensive full-stack development experience across multiple languages and domains
Strong track record in open-source contributions and technical workshops
Demonstrated expertise in agile practices, CI/CD, and test-driven development
concerns: German language proficiency is only basic, not meeting required fluency
Java experience is listed but not evidenced in any project or role
Senior-level background makes them overqualified and likely to leave quickly
